query: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_image FROM posts GROUP BY category
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ffDfLxGEerkSpA.e87efec9205a --database BvmmLkPh272eigDx9MFBhy --execute SELECT category, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_image FROM posts GROUP BY category
